title: AF.P - randomizer
summary: Drop it before any plugin or audio effect in Ableton Live, generate two random patches, then morph between them.
description:
I made a Max for Live device called AF.P - randomizer.

Drop it before any plugin or audio effect in Ableton Live. Generate two random patches, then morph between them. Simple as that.

It also works with VST3 plugins. Place any plugin after it in the chain, and AF.P - randomizer automatically detects that device as the target.
